overview: Siddartha Educational Academy Group of Institutions (SEAT), located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh, is a private autonomous educational institution offering undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering, management, and technology disciplines. The institution focuses on industry-oriented education, practical learning, and placement support for students across technical and management streams.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Convenor Quota (Category-A): Approximately ₹37,000 – ₹43,000 per year. Total estimated tuition across 4 years: ₹1,48,000 – ₹1,72,000 depending on regulatory revisions and branch.
Variable fee structure based on specialization demand, especially for Computer Science Engineering and allied branches.
Approximately ₹35,000 – ₹40,000 per year. Total estimated fee: ₹70,000 – ₹80,000.

placements.placementRate: Approximately 40% – 65% across eligible and registered candidates.
placements.totalOffers: 200+ selections across core and IT departments during major placement drives.
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, IBM, Accenture, Wipro, Tech Mahindra

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level entrance examinations and counseling processes for convener quota seats, while management quota admissions are offered directly by the institution based on eligibility norms.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow APSCHE counseling schedules and academic calendar notifications issued annually.

campus.hostelFee: ₹40,000 – ₹45,000 per year including room rent and mess charges.
campus.specialNote: One-time institutional charges range between ₹5,000 – ₹8,000 including registration and caution deposit fees.

hostel.hostelFee: ₹40,000 – ₹45,000 per year including room rent and mess charges.
hostel.note: ₹40,000 – ₹45,000 per year including room rent and mess charges.

scholarships.name: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD)
scholarships.description: Eligible Andhra Pradesh students from economically weaker sections receive full tuition fee reimbursement directly from the government.

scholarships.name: Post-Metric Scholarships
scholarships.description: Scholarships available for SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority category students as per Andhra Pradesh government norms.

scholarships.name: AICTE Tuition Fee Waiver (TFW)
scholarships.description: Limited tuition fee waiver seats available for meritorious students with annual family income below ₹8 LPA.

contact.address: Siddartha Educational Academy Group of Institutions (SEAT), Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh, India

sources.scholarships: Government of Andhra Pradesh scholarship schemes and AICTE TFW policy
